name: Ammar Naqvi
context: Worked together on the same team, February 2026
text: I worked with Guillaume on Autodesk Forma team Atlas for a year, and he's one of the best designers I've collaborated with. He's deeply experienced, genuinely user-first in every decision, and detail-oriented in a way that shows in everything he ships. His contributions to Forma were standout across multiple complex problem spaces, and you could always tell the craft and care that went into his work. He led design on the contextual data marketplace, tackling both the monetization and global distribution challenges that come with building that kind of platform at scale. On top of all that, he's just great to work with. Highly recommend.

name: Samar Vir Singh
context: Worked together on the same team, February 2026
text:
I've had the privilege of working closely with Guillaume Lassiat over several years, and I can say without hesitation that he is one of the most well-rounded digital professionals I've encountered in the design space.

What sets Guillaume apart is his rare ability to bridge design thinking with strategic thinking. His command of contextual data and real-time data integration — particularly within the ESRI ecosystem — is exceptional. He consistently translated complex geospatial concepts into intuitive, user-centered experiences that delivered genuine business value.

Guillaume is the kind of professional who elevates everyone around him. I wholeheartedly recommend him for any role at the intersection of UX, digital project management, and spatial technology.

name: Matthew Lam
context: Worked together on different teams, February 2026
text: Guillaume has an energy and optimism that has made collaborating on designs with him really engaging and productive. He's no stranger to exploring design concepts, and will dive into Figma to push the boundaries to what's possible in order to bring out the best product. His enthusiasm and positive attitude creates a space where people feel included and can bring out their best work. It also makes working in office with him a lot of fun. Definitely recommend!

name: Daniel Gameiro
role: Product Management | Autodesk Forma Community Growth
context: Worked together on the same team, February 2026
text:
I had the chance to work closely with Guillaume for almost three years, and it's rare to find someone who combines deep technical expertise with genuine curiosity and a strong focus on users the way he does.

Whether it was during the AI Internal Hackathon or through our work together on the Ecosystem squad, Guillaume consistently brought fresh ideas to the table — but what really stood out to me was his ability to turn those ideas into something concrete and valuable. He thinks about the real impact on developers and the broader ecosystem.

I especially appreciated his work around improving the Developer Experience for the Extension API/SDK while developing an internal add-on. Through his extension and the feedback he shared, he helped identify real friction points and pushed for practical improvements that made the extension shine. It wasn't just technical input — it was thoughtful, user-centered insight that strengthened the user experience.

Guillaume is someone I trust to take ownership, challenge the status quo in a constructive way, and raise the bar for the team. I'd be fortunate to work with him again.

name: Daria Golubeva
role: Content design & strategy @ Autodesk Forma | Product growth
context: Worked together on the same team, February 2026
text: Guillaume and were part of the design team at Forma in Autodesk for nearly 3 years and collaborated across UX and Content Design in the context of several squads he was part of. Alongside his UX and UI design work, I'd like to highlight the positive energy and team spirit he always brought to his teams. He contributed to many customer events and engagements with the developer community. His creativity also shows outside of work, including in his photography and the books he's creating. And extra kudos for always helping me practice my French!

name: Håkon Fure
context: Worked together on the same team, February 2026
text: Jeg jobbet tett med Guillaume i et team for å bygge en ende til ende løsning for å laste geodata over hele verden til brukere. Han brakte ikke bare solid kunnskap om web design, men alle mulige slags kreative ferdigheter og erfaringer inn hver dag. Alltid i stand til å se et problem fra nye vinkler og en konstant nysgjerrighet som gjorde det til en fryd å ha Guillaume som kollega.
textEn: I worked closely with Guillaume on a team to build an end-to-end solution for loading geodata worldwide for users. He brought not only solid web design knowledge but all kinds of creative skills and experiences every day. Always able to see a problem from new angles and with a constant curiosity that made it a joy to have Guillaume as a colleague.

name: Clément Lemaire
role: Adoption Specialist | Driving Product Growth with Autodesk Forma
context: Worked together on the same team, February 2026
text:
J'ai eu l'occasion de travailler étroitement avec Guillaume chez Autodesk Forma, notamment lors de rendez-vous clients stratégiques ainsi que sur des événements majeurs comme BIM World à Paris.

En tant qu'Experience Designer, Guillaume apporte une réelle valeur ajoutée dans les échanges avec les clients. Il sait traduire des sujets complexes en démonstrations claires, structurées et orientées usage. Sa capacité à comprendre rapidement les enjeux métiers et à adapter son discours en fonction du public fait vraiment la différence.

Sur le terrain, il combine une excellente maîtrise produit avec une posture très professionnelle et engageante. C'est un vrai atout dans des contextes à forte visibilité.

Je recommande vivement Guillaume pour son expertise, son sens du détail et sa capacité à créer des expériences qui parlent réellement aux utilisateurs.
textEn:
I had the opportunity to work closely with Guillaume at Autodesk Forma, including during strategic client meetings and at major events such as BIM World in Paris.

As an Experience Designer, Guillaume brings real added value in client exchanges. He knows how to translate complex topics into clear, structured, and usage-oriented demonstrations. His ability to quickly understand business stakes and adapt his discourse to the audience really makes a difference.

In the field, he combines excellent product mastery with a very professional and engaging stance. He's a real asset in high-visibility contexts.

I strongly recommend Guillaume for his expertise, attention to detail, and his ability to create experiences that truly speak to users.

name: Marie Coudié
text: Guillaume combines creativity, advanced video design skills, reactivity while understanding his client's needs and constraints. I highly recommend him.

name: Timothée Rischmann
context: Worked together at different companies (Tesla Motors), June 2015
text:
I've worked with Guillaume on projects for Tesla Motors. He always showed an amazing motivation in producing the best work quality. He is really exigent with himself and you can see it in his project results.
In addition to this Guillaume is really a talented artist with a mind full of ingenious idea. It's a real pleasure to work with Guillaume.

name: Antoine Elizabé
context: Worked together at different companies, March 2015
text:
I worked with Guillaume on three projects, a real pleasure at each time.
Guillaume is open minded, fast, he is always looking for the new and the right solution, and respects the schedule.

Great creative and technical skills, good capacity of management and work with a team.
I'm sure, I will work again with him.

name: Arnaud Cauly
context: Arnaud reported to Guillaume directly, March 2015
text:
Guillaume has been working with me for the past five years as a multimedia project manager on several 3D projects.

Guillaume is a conscientious and professional person with who we take pleasure in working and share. In addition he shows real skills in graphic design and video, Guillaume is listening his team, and can quickly identify issues thanks to his knowledge in new technologies and find a solution, as he show me on all professionals projects carried out jointly.

I have no hesitation in recommending Guillaume, I've been most fortunate to can work with him and I'm sure will be a excellent element for companies that would seek someone with human and professional qualities.

name: Maxime Lacoste
context: Worked together at different companies, March 2015
text:
I've had the opportunity to work with Guillaume on several projects and it has always been a pleasure collaborating with him. Organised, fast and reliable under pressure, Guillaume has solid management skills. On top of that, he has a very strong technic knowledge, making his understanding of digital possibilities and boundaries excellent, therefore easing the workflow with the production teams.
All this combined makes him a great project manager and a very good asset for a team. I hope we'll be working together again in the future.
